scripts.start: concurrently --names "SERVER,GENDER-AI,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:ai" "npm run start:client"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,GENDER-AI,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run dev:server" "npm run start:ai" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../klymo_client && npm install
